title: Week 8 Overview
html:
Week 8 Overview

Day 36
1. Verb in plain form + と言いました to report/quote something that was said
2. Verb in てform ＋きます to express “to go do something… and then come back”
3. Grammar focus on これから (after this)
4. Three new kanji: 書, 友, 休

Day 37
1. Verb in てform+います used when you put on/take off clothes
2. Grammar focus on the particle が and の as a subject in a noun modified clause
3. Grammar focus on the particle も
4. Katakana for things around me

Day 38
1. Verb in plain form+ら to express assumption
2. Verb in たform+ら to express a decision
3. Grammar focus on が as subject in an adverb clause
4. Grammar focus on the use of に instead へ
5. Grammar focus on the use of もし (if)
6. Counting up to １億 (one billion)
7. Three new kanji: 今, 週, 校

Day 39
1. How to use 〜てもform to say even if (several things) happen
2. How to use 〜なくてもform to say even if (several things) don’t happen
3. How to use a plain style in informal conversations
4. How to use the expression よかったらand またこんど
5. Katakana for seasoning

Day 40
1. いAdjectiveく／なAdjectiveに／Nounになります to express “to become”
2. Verb in dictionary form+と to express when, once
3. Grammar focus on the particles に to express change, と as a connector and を to express passing a place
4. Use of どうやって to express the method
5. Use of the adverbs だんだん, やっと, まっすぐ, and the counter 〜丁目 (ちょうめ)
6. Three new kanji: 前, 午, 後
